text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You guys, you guys! Tomorrow the crepe
place is going to be half off! We should go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Great idea! I'll obviously have the El Special!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El Special? Is that what you ordered last time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Claro! It's an egg and sausage crepe
with lots and LOTS of hot sauce!
The perfect crepe for me!♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll get the vanilla ice cream
crepe made with real Hokkaido milk♪
How about you, Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I'll get the red bean and
matcha syrup crepe. I just love how
subtle its sweetness is…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Japanese-style crepes do sound good!♪
All right, I can't wait until tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, then you'd better get studying…
Failing tomorrow's quiz will result in extra
lessons, and that means no crepes.
